properties.name: Exclusive Economic Zone - As Proclaimed and as Amended by the Perth Treaty 1997 (not yet in force) - AMB2020 - Limit
properties.legsou: Seas and Submerged Lands Act 1973 - Proclamation under section 10B (26/07/1994)
properties.disclaimer: This data is a digital representation of lines and zones established under legislation.  In the event of an inconsistency between this data and the legislation, the latter prevails.
